states.name: Kenshin
states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Kenshin was born into a family that had, for generations, overseen the guards of Rashomon Gate, the sole gate into the Capital. When Kenshin was fifteen, her father stepped down, and she became the head of the Uesugi family. Though free-spirited by nature, she possessed a strong sense of responsibility and was deeply trusted by her subordinates.

states.name: Kenshin
states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Her swordsmanship follows no particular school. Making use of her supple body and freeform thinking, she unleashes attacks that go far beyond her opponent's expectations. She possesses so much skill that an ordinary oni would be dispatched in an instant.

states.name: Kenshin
states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Due to its responsibilities, the Uesugi family maintained close ties with the Bureau of Onmyo, and it was there that Kenshin met her one and only best friend, Awa. The two were always together at the bureau, but one day Awa suddenly vanished without a trace. Ever since then, Kenshin has continued to search for clues while carrying out her duties, yet nothing has been found to this day.
